summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Strategic Program Manager who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing strategies grounded in evidence, and collaborating with cross-functional stakeholders for sustainable impact—diagnosing the real problem before designing the solution.

bullets.text: Manage end-to-end {ops|operations} for 20+ programs, partnering with {cross|Marketing, Tech, and Sales} leaders to align on priorities and trade-offs
Use {data|enrollment and feedback data} to assess opportunities, define problems, and make decisions in rapid cycles
Establish {ops|cross-functional processes} and documentation for 70+ staff, reducing onboarding time by 75%
Refine program positioning and {strat|value proposition} through listening sessions with 25 global {cross|stakeholders}
As a team of consultants, ran discovery and {amb|hypothesis-driven} diagnosis to define the real problem for an HR client
Audited 300+ leave cases to quantify $362K, refuting assumptions with {data|data analysis} and driving policy redesigns
For a separate NGO client, ran focus groups and 1:1 interviews, analyzing {data|qualitative data} to surface decision-making themes
Defined and led a self-started {strat|strategic} initiative, analyzing 2,000+ data points to find the top engagement driver
Transformed {data|mixed-methods data} into actionable reports that informed C-suite strategy and resource decisions
Provided consultations to improve strategic plans across DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Delivered 5 {cross|cross-functional} projects spanning survey development, analysis, and process improvement
Delivered strategic solutions for business priorities across employee relations, headcount, and succession planning
Optimized {ops|operational processes} across 3 global locations through process analysis and clearer ownership
Piloted an Inclusive Leadership initiative for senior leaders, later scaled to 23 global locations
Collaborated across an office of 22 nationalities, navigating {cross|global cross-functional} dynamics
Supported operational and HR functions at a fast-paced quantitative trading firm under rapid cycles
Researched global compensation and {data|market data} to inform a challenging international hiring decision
Engaged global candidates via personalized communication, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized events and moderated panels with C-suite, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

changeLog: 2026-05-31: Tailored for Duolingo — Manager, Strategy & Business Operations (Pittsburgh). Broad umbrella 'Strategic Program Manager.' Location → Pittsburgh, PA. Heavily reframed toward strategy/ops/analytics/ambiguity: InGenius leads with priority/trade-off alignment + rapid-cycle decisions; ODN uses ALL THREE bullets to show hypothesis-driven diagnosis + both projects (leave-cost + NGO focus groups) for analytical/consulting depth; NextGen reframed as a self-started strategic initiative; Kronos notes the quant-finance environment + market-data research. Skills lead with Data & Analytics + frameworks. ODN=3 bullets (both projects, kept separate + collective). Others=4. NOTE: JD wants 3+ yrs + strategy/consulting/PM background; Jamie's is OD-consulting + program mgmt, a reasonable STRETCH.
